sources.title: Balea PROFESSIONAL Leave-in Serum Brilliant Blond Hair Sealer 100 ml
sources.evidence: Product page lists Balea Professional brand, product title, 100 ml size, EUR 5.59 price, in-stock status, leave-in serum description, target bleached/highlighted/naturally blonde hair, heat protection up to 230 C, jojoba oil, keratin, INCI, and no-rinse directions.

sources.title: Balea professional Leave-In Serum Brilliant Blond Hair Sealer 100 ml
sources.evidence: Second retailer page matches product name and 100 ml volume, shows in-stock status, lists heat protection up to 230 C, target blonde hair types, jojoba oil, keratin, Germany as country, Balea as manufacturer, and matching INCI.

sources.title: Front packshot image
sources.evidence: Image shows a front-facing Balea Professional Brilliant Blond Hair Sealer pump bottle with visible product line, Hair Sealer name, and heat-protection badge.

field_rationales.product.image_url: Primary retailer CDN image is a clear front packshot matching the product label.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: Primary retailer page lists EUR 5.59 including VAT.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: Retailer title consistently names the product as Leave-in Serum Brilliant Blond Hair Sealer 100 ml; clean name separates the Brilliant Blond line from the product type.
field_rationales.product.category_key: Sources describe a leave-in serum and no-rinse use.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: Primary retailer page directly matches product identity and currently lists price and availability.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: Primary retailer title and brand link identify Balea Professional.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: Primary retailer page states the product is in stock.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_specs: Serum format, no-rinse directions, heat protection up to 230 C, jojoba oil, keratin, hydrolyzed wheat protein, dimethicone/dimethiconol, glycerin/propylene glycol/panthenol, shine and repair claims are source-supported. Medium weight is Chaarlie synthesis from serum format plus silicone/oil/fatty-alcohol formula. application_stage uses towel_dry because the category contract maps after-washing/damp/no-rinse evidence to towel_dry and forbids post_wash.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_fit_spec: The product is positioned as targeted leave-in care and heat-styling support for blonde lengths, not as a standalone rinse-out conditioner replacement.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_eligibil: Heat-styling eligibility is directly supported by the 230 C heat-protection claim; repair and shine fit are supported by source benefits. Thickness mapping is Chaarlie synthesis and should remain reviewer-visible.

review.notes: Prepared for Nick review from reseller evidence. Official dm.de source was not found; leave-in application_stage was corrected to the allowed towel_dry value.
